lines: Susanna reads the oldest household roll with one finger resting beside the denial column.
"My great-grandmother died under that sentence. The thing in the wicket still knows the household number."

choices.label: Record the buried pulse on the council board

questUpdate.log: The buried feed carries the Hallowfen rhythm. Resolve the Intake Clerk before choosing a water plan.

lines: "The names and whoever remains inside that body must survive if we can manage it. I will not call the failure clean if they do not."
"Read before you cut. Decide the water after the pipe stops answering."
Susanna writes MONITORED FLOW, IMPORTED WATER, ISOLATED LOOP, and FEED CLOSED on the back of a rejected transport order.
"Each answer has a person who pays. We choose after the wicket is quiet."
